author: dominikpieper
description: Save online content to your Vault, utilize embedded template engine and organize your reading list to your needs. Preserve the web with ReadItLater.

releases.description:
## What's Changed

### New features

* feat: add preview image URL variable to articles by @bmarsaud in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/109
* feat: Privacy enhanced mode for YouTube embeds  by @adamluckdev in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/119
* feat: Add publish date variabe for TwitterParser by @adamluckdev in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/122

### Fixes

* fix: Edit regex to support x.com in TwitterParser by @adamluckdev in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/118
* Add missing %date% variables to answer template by @adamluckdev in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/128

## New Contributors
* @bmarsaud made their first contribution in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/109

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/compare/0.3.1...0.4.0

releases.description:
## What's Changed

### New features

* Add support for embedding TikTok videos  by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/94
* Add settings to customize embed player size by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/97
* Extend share menu with plugin shortcut by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/99

### Fixes

* Correct a typo in Settings UI by @smartcaveman in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/88
* Fix youtube video without tags by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/93
* fix: YouTube regex to match only video ID by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/95

## New Contributors

releases.author: github-actions[bot]
releases.description:
## What's Changed

### New features

* Exposed %author% and %siteName% by @pmi5 in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/68
* feat: Add support for embeding Vimeo videos by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/71
* feat: Add parser for Stack Exchange sites by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/74

### Bugfixes

* Add nullish coalescing operator to prevent error for YoutTube parser in case of HTML change by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/70

### Internal changes

* Change build tool from Rollup to esbuild by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/69
* chore: Update npm dependencies and eslint configuration by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/75
* chore: Update esbuild by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/76

## New Contributors
* @pmi5 made their first contribution in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/68

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/compare/0.0.19...0.1.0

releases.description:

### Features

* Feature: Adding Mastodon parser by @ClarkAllen1556 in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/59
* Add option to download Mastodon Media attachments by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/65
* Add option to save Mastodon replies or whole threads by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/66
* Add estimated reading time of article as template variable by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/64
* Add additional YouTube video data by @lukacovicadam in https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/pull/67


**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/DominikPieper/obsidian-ReadItLater/compare/0.0.18...0.0.19
